Title: Relates to the transfer of incarcerated individuals from a county jail to a state correctional institution
Summary: Relates to the transfer of incarcerated individuals from a county jail to a state correctional institution when such county jail becomes unfit for the confinement of incarcerated individuals due to extraordinary circumstances.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the correction law, in relation to the transfer of incarcerated individuals from a county jail to a state correctional institution
